lang.label: Language
lang.chooseHelp: You can change this any time from the menu.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to see your crop price forecasts.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register once to save your crops and get forecasts.
auth.usernameLoginHint: The username you chose when you registered.
auth.usernameNewHint: Up to 50 letters. This is how you sign in.
auth.emailHint: We use this to keep your account safe.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.shortPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.invalidCredentials: That username or password is not correct. Please try again.
auth.usernameTaken: That username is already taken. Please choose another.
auth.emailTaken: That email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
auth.networkError: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.expiredNotice: You were signed out. Please sign in again.

common.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.staleBanner: Showing saved prices from {{date}} — reconnect for the latest.
common.staleBannerNoDate: Showing saved data — reconnect for the latest.

error.boundaryBody: Something went wrong here. Other parts of the app still work — please reload to try again.

forecast.bandAria: Most likely about {{mid}} per kg, and likely between {{min}} and {{max}}.
forecast.lowTrustLead: This is a rough guide, not a promise — check other sources before you decide.

factor.title: Why this forecast?
factor.noBreakdown: We don't have a detailed factor breakdown for this crop yet — this estimate is based on the note above.

share.lineCaveat: Note: rough estimate only — little data, so treat this as a rough guide, not a promise.

timeline.title: 12-month price — past and forecast
timeline.shortHistory: Only {{count}} months of price data so far — the forecast is a rough guide.
timeline.emptyBody: No price history yet for this crop, so we cannot draw a timeline.
timeline.errorNote: Could not load the price timeline. Your forecast above is still valid.
timeline.summaryAria: 12-month price for {{crop}}. Based on {{months}} months of past prices; expected about {{mid}} per kg at harvest around {{date}}, likely between {{min}} and {{max}}. Full numbers in the table below.
timeline.summaryAriaNoHarvest: 12-month price for {{crop}}, based on {{months}} months of past prices. Full numbers in the table below.

crop.emptyBody: No crop matches “{{query}}”. Try another word.

overview.title: Market overview
overview.subtitle: What changed in the markets — at a glance.
overview.windowCaption: Based on the last {{count}} days of market prices.
overview.moversNoRisers: No rising prices in this window.
overview.moversNoFallers: No falling prices in this window.
overview.moverRowAria: {{crop}} at {{market}}: {{price}} per kg, {{dir}} {{pct}} percent. Open in My harvest.
overview.latestSub: Most recent observed price per crop, with a recent-days trend.
overview.sparkAria: {{crop}} recent price at {{market}}: {{count}} days, from {{min}} to {{max}} per kg, latest {{latest}}.
overview.sparkAriaOne: {{crop}} recent price at {{market}}: one day only, {{latest}} per kg.
overview.tableTrendCaption: Recent price-trend numbers for each crop.
overview.teaserError: Could not load crop suggestions. The rest of this page still works.
overview.emptyBody: We don't have recent market prices to show yet. Please check back soon.

myHarvest.title: My harvest forecast
myHarvest.plantDateHint: We use this to work out your harvest time. You can pick a past or planned date.
myHarvest.harvestHint: Suggested from growth period — change freely
myHarvest.forecastComingFor: Your price forecast for {{crop}} planted on {{date}} will appear here.

bestCrops.title: Best crops to plant now
bestCrops.subtitle: Ranked by our price forecast for the months ahead.
bestCrops.lookbackCaption: Ranked using the last {{count}} months of prices.
bestCrops.scaleLegend: Bars compare the expected price on one scale, Rs. 0 to {{max}}.
bestCrops.scaleAria: Expected {{price}} per kg, on a shared scale up to {{max}}.
bestCrops.caveatNotRec: We don't suggest planting this now — recent prices and the trend look weak.
bestCrops.caveatLittleData: Little price data for this crop yet — treat this as a rough guide.
bestCrops.emptyBody: We could not rank any crops for this period. Try a longer price window.
bestCrops.tableCaption: Best crops to plant, ranked, using the last {{count}} months of prices.

compare.title: Compare crops
compare.subtitle: See how 2–3 crops' 12-month price outlook compares on one shared scale.
compare.pickHint: Tap up to {{max}} crops to overlay their price timelines.
compare.capNote: You can compare up to {{max}} crops at a time. Remove one to add another.
compare.chartAria: 12-month price comparison for {{count}} crops: {{crops}}. Solid lines are past prices, dashed lines are the forecast. Full numbers in the table below.
compare.bandCaption: Shaded bands show each crop's approximate price range — wider means less certain.
compare.thinNote: Only {{count}} months of price data for {{crop}} — its line is a rough guide.
compare.failNote: Could not load the price timeline for {{crop}}.
compare.allFailed: Could not load price timelines for the chosen crops. Please try again.
compare.emptyBody: Choose 2 or 3 crops above to see their price outlooks side by side.
compare.tableNote: Past prices are the monthly average; ~ marks a forecast (approximate).

prices.title: Prices
prices.soonBody: Recent market prices and short history will appear here in a future update.
prices.subtitle: Recent daily prices by market. Prices are the observed low–high range, not a forecast.
prices.marketsHint: Choose up to {{max}} markets to overlay.
prices.marketsCap: You can compare up to {{max}} markets. Remove one to add another.
prices.overlayAria: Daily price for {{crop}} across {{count}} markets: {{markets}}. Each line is a market's daily midpoint price. Full numbers in the table below.
prices.overlayEmpty: No recent price data for {{crop}} at the chosen markets yet.
prices.chartAria: Daily low–high price for {{crop}} at {{market}}: {{days}} days, from {{min}} to {{max}} per kg. Full numbers in the table below.
prices.shortHistory: Only {{count}} days of price data so far — treat this as a rough guide.
prices.emptyChart: No recent price data for this crop at this market yet.
prices.comparisonLegend: Bars compare each market's average price on one scale, Rs. 0 to {{max}}. The line shows the low–high range.

admin.demoNote: Demo data — connects to the live API after backend work lands.
admin.demoNoteNoApi: Demo data — this screen connects to the live API after backend work lands (around mid-July 2026).

noAccess.title: You don't have access to this area
noAccess.body: This section is for administrators only. If you think this is a mistake, contact your team.

policy.title: Policy flags
policy.subtitle: National policy measures the forecasting model uses.
policy.emptyBody: There are no policy flags recorded yet.
policy.emptyAsOf: No policy flags were active on the chosen date.
policy.sourceRequired: Source is required — policy flags feed the forecasting model, so every edit needs a citation.
policy.sourcePlaceholder: e.g. Ministry of Agriculture, Sri Lanka
policy.openEndedHint: Leave empty for an open-ended flag (still in effect).
policy.errDateOrder: The effective-to date must be on or after the effective-from date.
policy.deleteWarning: This policy flag feeds the forecasting model. Removing a past-dated flag may require a retrain.
policy.trainingWarning: This flag's effective window starts in the past. Because policy flags feed the forecasting model's training data, this change may require a retrain.

markets.title: Markets
markets.subtitle: The market registry the price data is organised by.
markets.liveNote: Live market data arrives with the markets API.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Accounts and roles. Farmers self-register; assign roles and manage accounts here.
users.deleteConfirm: Delete the account “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.
users.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account.
users.emptyBody: There are no user accounts to show.
users.selfRegisterNote: Farmers create their own accounts by registering. There is no add-user button here on purpose — use this page to change roles or remove accounts.

festivals.title: Festival calendar
festivals.subtitle: Festival dates and their demand lead-up window, grouped by year.
festivals.modelWarning: This table feeds the forecasting model — changes affect festival-demand signals in the price forecast.
festivals.deleteWarning: This entry feeds the forecasting model. Deleting it removes its festival-demand signal.
festivals.trainingWarning: This festival's date is in the past. Because festival dates feed the forecasting model's training data (lead-up demand windows), this change may require a retrain.
festivals.leadUpHint: Days of demand build-up before the festival. Use 0 for a multi-day festival's continuation day.
festivals.errLeadUp: Lead-up days must be a whole number from 0 to 90.
festivals.errSource: Source is required — this data feeds the model.
festivals.emptyBody: No festival entries yet. Add one to get started.

indicators.title: Economic indicators
indicators.subtitle: Macro series the forecasting model draws on. Read only.
indicators.explainer: This index tracks what a fixed basket of everyday goods costs. When it climbs, money is losing buying power and all prices — vegetables included — drift up with it. The forecasting model reads it as background inflation, so it can tell a crop that is genuinely getting scarce apart from prices that are simply rising everywhere.
indicators.gaugeZoneNote: Headline year-on-year inflation. Zones: below 0% prices falling, 0–6% mild (around the Central Bank's target), 6–11% elevated, above 11% high.
indicators.vintageNote: Each point shows two dates: the period it describes, and when it was published. Both matter — the value only became knowable on the publish date.
indicators.revisionNote: {{count}} earlier estimate(s) were later revised. The charts show the most recently published figure for each period.
indicators.noData: No data for this series yet.

news.title: News events
news.subtitle: Structured market-moving events, newest first.
news.explainer: Record the facts and the publish date. You don't set weights — the model learns how much each event matters from the data.
news.publishedReadonly: The publish date is the event's knowledge date and can't be changed after it's recorded.
news.emptyBody: No news events recorded yet. Add one to get started.

training.explainer: Each row is one model-training run. The gate decides whether a newly trained model is good enough to promote; the model actually serving forecasts now is marked Live. Lower MAE is better.
training.overrideNote: This model is serving now even though the gate declined it — a manual override. The decision below explains why.
training.emptyBody: No model training runs have been recorded yet.

userActivity.title: User activity
userActivity.explainer: A record of sign-ins and account changes. Failed sign-ins show the username that was tried — an unverified attempt, not a confirmed account.
userActivity.emptyBody: No user activity has been recorded yet.

errors.title: System errors
errors.explainer: Each row is one unexpected server error (a 500) that the app did not handle. The trace id matches the reference shown to the person who hit the error, so you can match a report to a row. Ordinary form and validation problems (400s) are not listed here.
errors.emptyBody: Nothing has gone wrong on the server — no unexpected errors have been recorded.

ingestion.title: Ingestion runs
ingestion.subtitle: Data pipeline runs and freshness checks.
ingestion.explainer: This is where market prices, weather and economic data enter the system. Each run fetches from one source; verification checks whether the new data looks sane before the model uses it.
ingestion.checksUnavailable: Verification details are unavailable for this run.
ingestion.emptyBody: No ingestion runs match this view yet.
